message:
Fix stale closure in useDashboardReset addMissingDefaults (#3705)

The addMissingDefaults callback captured the `cards` state at creation
time via its useCallback dependency array. When called later (e.g. after
user interactions that changed cards), it operated on a stale snapshot
instead of the current state.

Replace the direct `cards` dependency with a `useRef` that always holds
the latest cards value. This eliminates the stale closure while also
keeping the callback identity stable (no unnecessary child re-renders).

Closes #3679

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
